summary: The user is planning a trip to Tokyo and is interested in visiting theme parks, particularly Tokyo Disneyland and Universal Studios Japan. They shared their excitement about attending Halloween events at both parks, discussing their experiences and seeking information about attractions and seasonal decorations.
facts: The user is planning a trip to Tokyo soon.
The user attended the Disney Halloween event at Tokyo Disneyland with their family a few weeks ago.
The user rode the Haunted Mansion at Tokyo Disneyland, which was decorated for Halloween.
The user enjoyed the nighttime parade, Disney Halloween Street Party, at Tokyo Disneyland.
The user is interested in visiting Universal Studios Japan, especially the Wizarding World of Harry Potter.
The user has tried the Butterbeer ice cream at Universal Studios Japan and found it amazing.
The Halloween event at Universal Studios Japan usually runs from mid-September to November.
The user is looking forward to experiencing the Wizarding World during Halloween.
The user is interested in the decorations and attractions at Tokyo Disneyland's Halloween event.
The user is excited about the Halloween-themed food and drinks available at the parks.
